description: After being de-iced, a flight is delayed on the ground. The pilot must track the holdover time to ensure the de-icing fluid remains effective.

nodes.task_description: Note the start time of the de-icing procedure and the type of fluid used.
Consult the holdover time chart for the specific fluid type and current weather conditions (e.g., light snow, freezing rain).

expected_outcome.value: Pilot determines the maximum time they can wait before takeoff.

nodes.task_description: If the ground delay exceeds the holdover time, coordinate with ATC and ground crew to return to the gate for re-application of de-icing fluid.

expected_outcome.value: The delay is long, and the pilot makes the decision to return for re-treatment.
